requirement.description: When the driver requests high beam, the IC shall transmit the high beam switch request on the CAN bus.

test_cases.title: Verify High_Beam_Switch_Requested = 1 when pressed
steps: Operate high beam stalk to ON
test_cases.expected_result: Signal value is 1 and transmitted periodically
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hb_001_high_beam_on(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_ic_messages(can_bus, 2)
    assert msgs, 'No IC frames received'
    assert all(get_high_beam_status(m.data) == 1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify High_Beam_Switch_Requested = 0 when not requested
steps: Ensure stalk is in OFF position

test_cases.title: Transition: OFF to ON
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; start with High Beam OFF
test_cases.expected_result: Updates to 1 within next message cycle

test_cases.title: Transition: ON to OFF
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; high beam initially ON

test_cases.title: Signal Stability (ON)
Signal Stability (OFF)
Interface Verification: Message ID
test_cases.expected_result: Signal is transmitted only in ID 0x300

test_cases.title: Structural Verification: Bit Position
test_cases.expected_result: Bit 1 = 1 when ON, Bit 1 = 0 when OFF

test_cases.title: Robustness: Invalid Values
Timing: Periodic Transmission
